calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Jul-07-2021 Set For Trial On Jul-07-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 504

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-08-2021 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Bill Rubenstein, Appellant/Respondent
Helanine Rubenstein, Appellant/Respondent
Emmanuel Mendoza, Respondent/Appellant

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn by the clerk.

Mr. Rubenstein, Appellant/Respondent presents opening statements and submit copies of exhibits.

Mr. Mendoza, Respondent/Appellant testifies on his behalf.

Mr. Rubenstein, Appellant/Respondent testifies on his behalf.

The Court confirms the following exhibits, previously submitted from appellant:
Exhibit B: Estimate for repair to main roof, 542 44th Avenue
Exhibit C: Estimnate for repair to back dining room windows.
Exhibit D: Estimate for repair to neighbor's property.
Exhibit E: Estimate for repair to driveway and monies already paid this repair.

The Court asks Mr. Mendoza addtional questions.

The Court takes a brief recess and takes the matter under submission.
Court resumes and issues his judgment in favor of Mr. Mendoza and against Bill and Helanine Rubenstein.

Judge: Garrett Wong , Clerk: R. Gumpal, Not Reported, (504).

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-08-2021 Judgment Entered

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
